column1: You can save 30% on your next Delta Air Lines flight between Dallas/Fort Worth and any city Delta serves in the continental United States! Just click below for an easy-to-use electronic reward.
Just click the link above, and we'll deposit to your account an electronic reward for 30% off a Delta Air Lines flight. Book by April 12 and complete your trip by June 20, 2002.
